policy.name: text_loc_disjoint
policy.description: For SUPPORT predictions only, extract location-like spans from claim and evidence text; if both sides contain non-empty disjoint location sets, shadow SUPPORT to NOT_ENTITLED.

stage123b_variants.interpretation: Strong controlled diagnostic robustness across evidence interfaces.

external_vitaminc.interpretation: Small external benefit with small false-NE cost; requires further stress testing.

interpretation.reason_not_final_ready: External evidence is limited, Stage63 shows a small false-NE cost, and the extractor remains a simple regex heuristic.

next_stage_recommendation.goal: Implement a reusable shadow-only text_loc_disjoint analyzer for arbitrary prediction JSONLs.
requirements: Policy must use only claim/evidence text and existing prediction labels.
Gold/intervention/family fields may be used only for evaluation/audit when present.
Export per-file metrics, aggregate metrics, group audit metrics, and changed examples.
avoid: turning the heuristic into a training loss
claiming external generalization from the current limited external sample
